---
name: Feature Request / Research Proposal
about: Propose a new algorithm, environment, experiment, or infrastructure improvement
title: "[FEAT] <concise one-line description>"
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Motivation

_What problem does this feature solve? What research question does it address?_

## Proposed Solution

_Describe the proposed change at a technical level. Reference relevant papers or prior work where applicable._

## Experimental Validation

_How would you verify that this feature works correctly? What metrics or ablations are appropriate?_

## Alternatives Considered

_What other approaches did you consider, and why do you prefer the proposed solution?_

## Implementation Notes

_Any notes on implementation complexity, dependencies, or compatibility with the existing codebase._
